---
name: Feature request
about: Propose an enhancement or new capability
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What's missing or awkward today, and who it affects.

## Proposed change

What you'd like to see. If it touches infrastructure or cost, note the impact on the two profiles.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you weighed, and why this one.

## Scope check

- [ ] This fits the project's direction (see [ROADMAP.md](../../ROADMAP.md))
- [ ] I'm willing to help implement it
